name: discharge_coordinator
description: Orchestrates a complete hospital discharge packet in <60 s by delegating to MedRecon, CarePlan, and FollowUp sub-agents via A2A. Reads patient data from FHIR R4. DEMO ONLY — SYNTHETIC DATA. NOT FOR CLINICAL USE.

extensions.description: FHIR context for secure patient data access

skills.name: Discharge Planning
skills.description: Generates a complete structured discharge packet: reconciled medication list, patient-readable care instructions, and follow-up coordination — all grounded in FHIR resources.

apiKeySecurityScheme.name: X-API-Key
apiKeySecurityScheme.description: API key required to access this agent.
